recommendations.title: Quicksand
recommendations.overview: A married couple on the brink of divorce becomes trapped in quicksand while hiking through a Colombian rainforest. It’s a struggle for survival as they battle the elements of the jungle and must work together in order to escape.

recommendations.title: The Abyss
recommendations.overview: A civilian oil rig crew is recruited to conduct a search and rescue effort when a nuclear submarine mysteriously sinks. One diver soon finds himself on a spectacular odyssey 25,000 feet below the ocean's surface where he confronts a mysterious force

recommendations.title: Below
recommendations.overview: In the dark silence of the sea during World War II, the submarine USS Tiger Shark prowls on what should be a routine rescue mission. But for the shell-shocked crew, trapped together in the sub's narrow corridors and constricted spaces, this is about

recommendations.title: The Tunnel
recommendations.overview: When a truck crashes inside a tunnel, people on their way home for Christmas are brutally trapped in a deadly fire. With a blizzard raging outside, and the first responders struggling to get to the accident, it's every man for himself.

recommendations.title: The Lost Bus
recommendations.overview: A determined father risks everything to rescue a dedicated teacher and her students from a raging wildfire.

recommendations.title: The Ledge
recommendations.overview: A thriller in which a battle of philosophies between a fundamentalist Christian and an atheist escalates into a lethal battle of wills.

recommendations.title: 47 Meters Down
recommendations.overview: Two sisters on Mexican vacation are trapped in a shark observation cage at the bottom of the ocean, with oxygen running low and great whites circling nearby, they have less than an hour of air left to figure out how to get to the surface.

recommendations.title: Atacama's 33
recommendations.overview: A team of Chilean miners are trapped underground for months and hold out for a miraculous rescue.

recommendations.title: Rush
recommendations.overview: Undercover cop Jim Raynor is a seasoned veteran. His partner, Kristen Cates, is lacking in experience, but he thinks she's tough enough to work his next case with him: a deep cover assignment to bring down the notoriously hard-to-capture drug lord Ga

recommendations.title: Time Trap
recommendations.overview: A group of students become trapped inside a mysterious cave where they discover time passes differently underground than on the surface.
